search.no_results_suggestion: Try improving your results by double checking your spelling, or trying a more general keyword.
search.use_search_bar_above: You can use the search bar above to try searching with different terms.

errors.default_message: Something went wrong. Please try again later.
errors.not_found_description: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.

payment_success.title: Order placed successfully!
payment_success.subtitle: Thank you for your order. We will be in touch shortly.
payment_success.no_order_message: We could not find your order. Please try again.
payment_success.slip_verified_text: Your slip was verified and your payment is recorded — this order will proceed as normal.

pay.description: Paying a total of {total} for {items} items
pay.processed: Thank you for your purchase! Your order is being processed.
pay.continue_hint: Enter your details and pay on the next step.
pay.paypal_missing_order_paid_secret: Payment succeeded, but order sync failed.
pay.paypal_missing_wc_update_config: Payment succeeded, but order sync config is incomplete.
pay.open_omise_hint: If the page does not open, allow pop-ups or copy the link from the address bar.
pay.promptpay_hint: Follow on-screen instructions to complete payment.
pay.test_mode_promptpay: In test mode, payments are simulated. Real money is not charged.
pay.after_paid: After payment, you will be redirected automatically.
pay.paypal_invalid: Invalid payment response. Please try again.
pay.test_card_hint: Test: card 4242424242424242, any future expiry, any 3-digit CVC.

login_required.title: Please log in
login_required.message: You must log in before you can place an order

empty_cart.title: Your cart is empty
empty_cart.message: Add items to your cart before checkout.

error.incomplete_data: Please fill in all required fields
error.insufficient_stock: Some items are out of stock or quantity is too high. Adjust or remove them from your cart.
error.stock_check_failed: Could not verify stock. Please try again.

payment_slip.title: Upload payment slip
payment_slip.subtitle: Order #{n} · Amount ฿{amount}
payment_slip.instructions: Transfer the exact amount to the shop account below, choose the bank you transferred from, then upload your slip image or PDF. We verify with SlipOK before confirming payment. Bangkok Bank (BBL): wait 8 minutes before submitting the slip. Other banks: about 15 seconds.
payment_slip.bank_account_default:
Bank: Kasikornbank (KBank)
Account name: Paradorn Pokpingmueang
PromptPay: 0901612496
payment_slip.qr_dynamic_scan_hint: This QR embeds the amount — some bank apps cannot scan it. Try another bank app, transfer using the PromptPay number below, or ask the shop to disable “embed amount in QR” in server settings.
payment_slip.slip_data_placeholder: Paste payload from SlipOK or QR string (if your flow uses data mode)
payment_slip.slip_data_hint: If you use SlipOK “data” verification, paste the QR/slip payload here. Otherwise you can upload an image or slip URL below.
payment_slip.bbl_bank_required: Please select the bank you transferred from
payment_slip.bbl_bank_hint: The timer starts as soon as you select your bank: BBL 8 minutes (with a reminder dialog). Other banks: about 15 seconds.
payment_slip.bbl_modal_body: BBL slips often need about 8 minutes before they can be verified. The submit button will unlock automatically when the timer ends.
payment_slip.cooldown_other_banks_hint: After you transfer, wait about 15 seconds so SlipOK can verify the slip. The submit button unlocks automatically when the timer ends.
payment_slip.result_error_title: Slip result: verification did not pass
payment_slip.result_error_hint: The slip could not be verified yet. Details below.
payment_slip.verify_success_toast: Slip verified — your payment is confirmed
payment_slip.verify_success_body: Your slip was verified and your payment has been confirmed.
payment_slip.outcome_hint: After you submit your slip, the verification result appears below (Thai or English, matching your site language).
payment_slip.billing_resume_note: Prefilled from your account — you can edit below (changes here do not update the saved order record).

errors.generic: Payment could not be confirmed. Please try again.
errors.PAYMENT_PROOF_REQUIRED: Please upload your payment slip (image or PDF).
errors.FILE_REQUIRED: Please upload your payment slip (JPG, PNG, WebP, or PDF).
errors.SLIP_INVALID: This slip could not be verified. Check the amount and image.
errors.SLIP_BANK_DELAY: Bangkok Bank slips need time to become verifiable — wait about 7 minutes, then submit your slip for payment verification.
errors.SLIPOK_NOT_CONFIGURED: Slip verification is not configured on the server.
errors.VERIFY_RESPONSE_MISSING: The server said paid but the response did not include SlipOK verification — do not treat as success; update the backend or try again.
errors.FORBIDDEN: You cannot pay for this order.
errors.UPLOAD_ERROR: File upload failed. Try a smaller image or another format.
errors.VALIDATION_ERROR: Invalid request. Check order and slip fields.

my_products.title: My Products
my_products.no_products_search_hint: Try different keywords or clear the search box.
my_products.load_error: An error occurred while loading data
my_products.login_required_create: Please log in before creating a product
my_products.login_required_edit: Please log in before editing a product
my_products.no_permission_edit: You do not have permission to edit this product
my_products.moderation_toast: {n} listing(s) have admin feedback from review. Check the cards below.
my_products.moderation_banner_title: Some listings did not pass review
my_products.moderation_banner_body: Admin left feedback on {n} product(s). Open each card, read the notes, update the listing, then save.
my_products.moderation_banner_hint: After you address the issues, your listing may go back for review.
my_products.moderation_action_hint: Edit the product to fix these points, then save.
my_products.moderation_notice_title: Did not pass review — admin message
my_products.moderation_issue_photos: Photos are unclear, too few, or do not match the item
my_products.moderation_issue_title_name: Product title is unclear or misleading
my_products.moderation_issue_description: Description is incomplete or does not match the item
my_products.moderation_issue_stock: Stock quantity is unclear or inaccurate
my_products.moderation_issue_illegal_or_prohibited: Prohibited item, copyright issue, or policy violation

product.free_return: Free returns within 15 days. Click for detailed
product.cancel_confirm_message: Are you sure you want to cancel this product? The product will not be displayed in the store and cannot be added to cart.
product.restore_confirm_message: Do you want to restore this product to be displayed in the store?
product.restore_success: Product restored successfully. The product will return to pending status.

cart.notting_added: You haven't added any items to your cart yet.
cart.login_required: Please sign in to add items to your cart.

favorites.wishlist_lives_here: Wishlist you create will live here. These are a few of your favorite things...

errors.password_min_length: Password must be at least 8 characters

messages.wait_email_check: Please wait for the email check to finish
messages.error_email_conflict: This email may already be registered.

order.no_orders_search_hint: Try different keywords or clear the search box.
order.start_shopping: Start shopping to create your first order
order.login_required_message: Please log in to view your orders
order.error_loading: An error occurred while loading orders
order.cancel_order_confirm: Are you sure you want to cancel this order? This action cannot be undone.
order.cancel_error: An error occurred while cancelling the order
order.cannot_cancel_reason: Orders with status {status} cannot be cancelled
order.no_permission_cancel: You do not have permission to cancel this order
order.only_pending_processing_onhold_can_cance: Only orders with status pending, processing, or on-hold can be cancelled
order.error_loading: An error occurred while loading order details

profile.email_readonly: Email cannot be changed (linked to your account)

seller_orders.title: Customer Payment Status
seller_orders.no_orders_search_hint: Try different keywords or clear the search box.
seller_orders.no_customers: No customers have ordered your products yet
seller_orders.error_loading: An error occurred while loading orders
seller_orders.email_readonly: Email cannot be changed (linked to your account)
seller_orders.tracking_seller_only_hint: As the seller, enter the courier tracking number here so the buyer can follow the parcel.
seller_orders.fulfillment_after_payment: After the customer has paid, enter the tracking number and save — the timeline updates from the carrier automatically.
seller_orders.shipping_status_from_tracking_hint: The shipping steps above update from your tracking number when you save (carrier data). You do not pick a status manually.
seller_orders.fulfillment_save_error: Could not save. Please try again.

register.title: Register
register.email_exists: This email is already in use
register.wait_email_check: Please wait for email verification to complete
register.email_may_exist: An error may have occurred because this email already exists in the system
register.create_error: An error occurred while creating WordPress user

create_product.title: Create New Product
create_product.sale_price_hint: Sale price must be lower than regular price
create_product.stock_quantity_hint: Stock quantity must be greater than 0
create_product.image_formats: Supports JPG, PNG, GIF, WebP, HEIC (including from mobile)
create_product.update_error: An error occurred while updating the product
create_product.edit_load_error: Could not load this product for editing.
create_product.create_success: Product created successfully! Status: Under review — an admin will publish or hide it on the store.
create_product.create_error: An error occurred while creating the product
create_product.sale_price_must_be_lower: Sale price must be lower than regular price
create_product.no_categories_found: No product categories found. Please check if WordPress has WooCommerce Product Categories

dashboard.heading: Dashboard
dashboard.lead: Manage catalog, users, and seller orders.
dashboard.products_desc: List, create, edit, hide or restore products (CRUD).
dashboard.categories_desc: Create categories with optional cover image for the storefront carousel.
dashboard.tags_desc: Create and edit product tags (CRUD). Tags appear in seller product forms via wp-tags.
dashboard.users_desc: Create, edit, delete users and set account status (public / pending / block).
dashboard.orders_desc: All platform orders when logged in as admin.

users.title: Users
users.create_page_lead: Fill in the details to add an account. After success you return to the user list.
users.password_min: Password must be at least 8 characters (same as API).
users.load_failed: Could not load users. Check API is running and you use an admin account.
users.load_forbidden: Not allowed: log in as an admin (after db:seed use admin{'@'}demo.local). Log out and sign in again.
users.super_admin_field_locked_hint: Super admin email and role cannot be changed.
users.delete_confirm: Permanently delete {email}? This cannot be undone.

categories.title: Categories
categories.lead: Create or edit categories and upload a cover image. Slug is generated from the name if left empty.
categories.slug_hint: URL segment; must be unique. Leave blank to generate from the name.
categories.image_hint: Upload a file (JPEG, PNG, WebP, GIF, max 5 MB) or leave empty.
categories.confirm_remove: Delete category "{name}"? Products in this category will lose the category link.
categories.edit_select_hint: Choose a category in the table below, then edit here.

tags.title: Tags
tags.lead: Manage tags for product forms. Slug is generated from the name if left empty.
tags.slug_hint: URL segment; must be unique. Leave blank to generate from the name.
tags.edit_select_hint: Choose a tag in the table below, then edit here.

orders.title: Orders
orders.lead: All orders — admins can update shipping status and timeline for any order.
orders.fulfillment_hint: With a tracking number and 17TRACK configured, courier and status may update automatically — or set status and courier manually.
orders.mark_paid_confirm: Set this order to paid in the database? Use when the customer paid but automatic slip verification did not succeed.
orders.mark_paid_fail: Could not mark order as paid
orders.slip_empty: No slip images on file yet
orders.slip_no_image: Verified with text/QR only (no image file)

products.title: Products
products.list_lead: Data from GET /api/my-products (JWT). Admins see all products.
products.confirm_cancel: Hide this listing from the storefront?
products.validation_create: Enter a valid name and price.
products.review_reject_hint: Select at least one issue or write a message, then submit to save and set the listing to hidden.
products.review_issue_photos: Photos are unclear, too few, or do not match the item
products.review_issue_title_name: Product title is unclear or misleading
products.review_issue_description: Description is incomplete or does not match the item
products.review_issue_stock: Stock quantity is unclear or inaccurate
products.review_issue_illegal_or_prohibited: Prohibited item, copyright issue, or policy violation
products.review_message_placeholder: e.g. Please add a photo of the back of the item.
products.review_need_reason: Select at least one issue or enter a message.
